with:
  # Identify the main subject (most common subject in triples)
      if not triples:
          return ""
  
      subjects = [t.subject for t in triples]
      main_subject = max(set(subjects), key=subjects.count) if subjects else ""
  
      # Build sentence parts with proper connectors
      sentence_parts = []
      relative_clauses = []
  
      # Process location-related triples first (country, state, isPartOf)
      location_info = []
      for t in triples:
          if t.predicate == "country":
              location_info.append(f"in {t.object}")
          elif t.predicate == "state":
              location_info.append(f"located in the state of {t.object}")
          elif t.predicate == "isPartOf":
              location_info.append(f"part of {t.object}")
  
      # Start with main subject and type if available
      type_triple = next((t for t in triples if t.predicate == "type"), None)
      if type_triple:
          sentence_parts.append(f"{main_subject} is a {type_triple.object}")
      else:
          sentence_parts.append(main_subject)
